name: Improved STL Validator (Final)
description: Validates ASCII STL files for manufacturing suitability: checks triangle count, surface area, manifold closure (open edges), inverted face normals via winding-order cross-product verification, and degenerate (zero-area) triangles. Fixes the hidden inverted-normal bug present in stl_validator_provided.py. All 3 test cases pass (valid mesh, inverted normals, open mesh).
